targetAudience: Product managers, engineering teams, companies with 50-500 employees
primaryGoal: Increase inbound leads through AI-powered search visibility (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude)
aiToolsAccess: ChatGPT mentions us occasionally (~10% of queries), Perplexity never surfaces our brand
contentIndexed: Blog (20 articles), Product documentation (50 pages), 3 case studies, Comparison pages (vs Asana, Monday.com)
competitorVisibility: Asana and Monday.com appear in 80%+ of AI tool responses for 'project management software' queries. Notion appears in 60%+. We appear <5%.
seoEfforts: Active SEO for 6 months, currently ranking #5-10 for 'project management tool' and related keywords. Monthly organic traffic growing 15%.
